title: Bootstrap Endpoint Abuse Protection
description: Add stricter rate limiting and abuse protection to /api/v1/agents/bootstrap and /api/v1/agents/quickstart endpoints. These endpoints bypass authentication and agent-based rate limiting, allowing unrestricted root agent creation. Implement stricter IP-based rate limits specific to these endpoints, and optionally require a bootstrap token or invite code for root agent creation in production.
validation: Bootstrap and quickstart endpoints have dedicated IP-based rate limits stricter than general API
Rate limit is configurable via settings
429 response returned when limit exceeded with Retry-After header
Optional bootstrap token/invite code mechanism for production
Tests verify rate limiting on bootstrap endpoints
Tests verify abuse scenario (rapid agent creation) is blocked
